summary: Backend-only verification completed for plugin licensing/security fixes using static code review plus executable checks (pytest, ruff, py_compile). Live endpoint positive-path validation remains blocked by missing runtime env configuration.

minor.issue: Runtime API verification is blocked because NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL/REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL, MOREPHI_PUBLIC_CLIENT_TOKEN, and MOREPHI_TEST_LICENSE_KEY are not set in this environment; pytest cases are skipped by design.

action_items: Provide runtime envs and rerun: NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL or REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL, MOREPHI_PUBLIC_CLIENT_TOKEN, MOREPHI_TEST_LICENSE_KEY, LICENSE_SIGNING_PRIVATE_KEY_PEM.
Run /tmp/more-phi-landing-page/backend/tests/test_plugin_license_api.py against live endpoint to validate activate/refresh/deactivate positive path end-to-end.
Complete C++ runtime test execution (at least licensing-tag suite) in a longer-build CI runner and attach results.
critical_code_review_comments: Confirmed signing_key() now fails closed when LICENSE_SIGNING_PRIVATE_KEY_PEM is absent (no deterministic JWT_SECRET-derived signing fallback observed).
Confirmed deactivate now validates product/license context via find_plugin_license(activation['license_key'], payload.product_id).
Confirmed positive-path pytest exists and is guarded correctly by MOREPHI_TEST_LICENSE_KEY for activate/refresh/deactivate.
Confirmed C++ parser update supports legacy MPHI purchasing keys and TestLicensing includes coverage for MPHI parse acceptance.

success_rate.backend: 75% (static + lint/compile + pytest harness verified; live API and C++ runtime execution pending env/build window)
success_rate.methodology: Computed as a weighted sum of verification stages: 35% static code review, 15% local syntax checks, 25% unit tests (pytest harness validated), 25% end-to-end integration tests.

test_credentials: Read /app/memory/test_credentials.md; no user accounts/private credentials provided.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validated requested fixes in code: no JWT-derived signing fallback, deactivation product_id context check present, positive-path plugin pytest skeleton present, python lint+py_compile pass. Runtime plugin endpoint tests currently skip without env vars; next run should focus on live endpoint assertions and C++ runtime licensing test execution.
rca of the issue: Primary blocker is environment-driven test skipping, not application failure: test_plugin_license_api.py intentionally skips when BASE_URL/token/test key are unset. C++ runtime confirmation blocker is build duration/resource constraints for full JUCE-linked test target within this session window.
